The Run screen now parses correctly. To avoid another back-and-forth after PR merge, I’m thinking to run the fix branch only up to the plan/manual validation step, without approving apply, just to confirm the pipeline reaches plan successfully.

If you prefer, I can skip the temporary validation and proceed directly with PR approval/merge first, then run from Develop.
